description_long: This is a classic banker’s lamp featuring a curved, glossy green glass shade supported by a brass or brass-like metal frame. The lamp has a sturdy, round, and ornately ridged base, also made of metal, providing stability and a touch of vintage elegance. A pull-chain switch hangs from beneath the shade, allowing for easy operation. The lamp’s frame includes two horizontal arms that connect the shade to the central support, with decorative finials at each end. The green glass shade is slightly translucent, diffusing light softly when illuminated. This style of lamp is commonly found on desks in libraries, offices, or study areas, adding both functional lighting and a decorative accent.
description: A vintage-style banker’s lamp with a glossy green glass shade, brass frame, and pull-chain switch, set on an ornate round metal base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full green glass shade, pull-chain, and symmetrical brass arms with the ornate base partially visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved profile of the green glass shade and the elongated brass arm connecting to the round base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the green shade, both brass finials, and the full round base with the pull-chain visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other profile of the shade and arm, with the base and pull-chain in clear view.
